hooks.command: cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && echo 'Running tests before push...' && python -m pytest engines/*/tests/ shared/*/tests/ -q --tb=line 2>&1 | tail -8; echo 'NOTE: 1 known failure (API key). If you see ONLY that failure, push is safe.'

cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'engines/.*/src/\|shared/.*/src/' || true); if [ "$changed" -gt 0 ]; then echo "REMINDER: $changed source file(s) staged. Did you run tests? Did you update CLAUDE.md?"; fi

file_path="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$file_path" ]; then file_path="$TOOL_INPUT_PATH"; fi; if echo "$file_path" | grep -q 'engines/.*/src/\|shared/.*/src/\|interface/.*/src/'; then component=$(echo "$file_path" | sed -E 's|.*(engines|shared|interface)/([^/]*)/.*|\1/\2|'); echo "REMINDER: Code modified in $component. Update SPEC.md if behavior changed. Update CLAUDE.md if state changed."; fi; if echo "$file_path" | grep -q 'SPEC.md'; then echo 'SPEC MODIFIED: Run /check-spec to verify consistency.'; fi; if echo "$file_path" | grep -q 'schemas/'; then echo 'SCHEMA MODIFIED: Run /verify-boundaries all to check pipeline consistency.'; fi
